name: vol_exactly_at_max
description: symphony_vol exactly equals BREAKEVEN_ACTIVATION_MAX (3.0). dynamic_activation = 3.0. Pins boundary behavior at the upper clamp.
derivation: dynamic_activation = max(0.4, min(3.0, 3.0)) = max(0.4, 3.0) = 3.0 (exact MAX). threshold = 3.0 - 0.2 = 2.8. current_return (2.8) >= 2.8 -> ticks++ -> 0 + 1 = 1 (boundary equality fires the >=). 1 < 5 -> not locked. not locked -> stop = base_stop_level = -1.25. Catches an impl using strict `<` instead of `<=` at the boundary (would reset instead of increment).
